svg.title: Storage Layer Ownership and Truth (ibkr canary)
svg.desc: Human-authored TOML, original broker and source evidence, daemon secrets, and app identity remain separate from SQLite. The daemon alone writes daemon.db and exposes structured product access. Recovery artifacts are a distinct boundary, not an output of secrets or app state.
svg.metadata: Generic component icons derived from Tabler Icons 3.45.0, MIT License. Canary mark copyright the ibkr project.
svg.text: SQLite is the local engine; one daemon owns the meaning, writes, and typed access path.

g.aria-label: Human TOML. config · policy. approved limits. people edit
Original evidence. Flex XML · broker data. source observations. measured outside
Daemon secrets. Flex token. preview signer. private files
App identity. device grants · push. relay credentials. separate app state

svg.text: THE DAEMON IS THE ONLY WRITER
SQLite · WAL · transactional state and evidence

g.aria-label: Order safety. routes · tokens · ID floors
CLI · app · MCP. structured RPC. no direct DB access. product API
Analytics. bounded query. or versioned export. never live-file SQL
Offline review. stopped daemon. or verified backup. read-only

svg.text: app identity has its own owner · original broker evidence stays outside SQLite
